Tooltip_item_runFlatTire: Military grade tire that will never pop but will lose traction when condition is low.
Tooltip_item_damnSteelRim: Basic rim type used for tire crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnTireRubber: Tire rubber is used for tire crafting. Condition of tire rubber will affect condition of crafted tire.
Tooltip_item_damnTireMount: Tire rubber mount saves space when storing tire rubber.
Tooltip_item_damnGlassPane: Glass pane is used with scalpel to craft vehicle windows.
Tooltip_item_damnHandle: Handle is used for vehicle door crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnHinge: Hinge is used for vehicle door crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnRubberStrip: Rubber strips are used for windshield and vehicle door crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnSeatFabric: Seat fabric is used for vehicle seat crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnSeatFoam: Seat foam is used for vehicle seat crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnSeatFrame: Seat frame is used for vehicle seat crafting.
Tooltip_item_damnTireRepairKit: Set of tools for tire repair on the go.
Tooltip_item_damnTireRepairTools: Main tool from tire repair kit, requires rubber solution and repair strips to patch tires.
Tooltip_item_damnTireRepairSolution: One of three tire repair kit components, requires repair tools and repair strips to patch tires.
Tooltip_item_damnTireRepairStrips: One of three tire repair kit components, requires repair tools and rubber solution to patch tires.
Tooltip_item_damnPlasticWeldingKit: Set of tools for plastic part repair on the go.
Tooltip_item_damnPlasticWeldingGun: Main tool from plastic welding kit, requires battery and welding staples.
Tooltip_item_damnPlasticWeldingStaples: One of two plastic welding kit components, requires battery powered welding gun to be used for plastic part repair.
Tooltip_item_damnmoldBox: Wooden box used for plaster molds.
Tooltip_item_damngenericMold: Wooden box containing plastic part submerged in plaster
Tooltip_item_damngenericNegativeMold: Negative plaster mold that can be used with styrofoam paste to produce new plastic part.
Tooltip_item_damngenericFilledMold: Plaster mold filled with styrofoam paste.
Tooltip_item_damnacetone: Container of acetone, used to make styrofoam paste.
Tooltip_item_damnstyrofoam: Styrofoam is used with acetone to create styrofoam paste.
Tooltip_item_damnstyrofoamPaste: Container of styrofoam paste, used to create new plastic parts in molds.
Tooltip_item_damnAutoManual: Manual containing crafting schematics for specific vehicle
Tooltip_item_damnSideArmor: Armor elements that protect side windows
Tooltip_item_damnWindshieldFrontArmor: Armor elements that protect front windshield
Tooltip_item_damnWindshieldRearArmor: Armor elements that protect rear windshield
Tooltip_item_damnBumperFront: Offers basic protection for headlights, hood and engine
Tooltip_item_damnBullbarFront: Offers significant protection for headlights, hood and engine
Tooltip_item_damnBumperRear: Offers basic protection for taillights, trunk lid and trunk storage
Tooltip_item_damnBullbarRear: Offers significant protection for taillights, trunk lid and trunk storage
Tooltip_AttachBackpack: Tweaks item for attaching to upgraded Backpacks
Tooltip_AttachBackpackTier1: Adds Slots: Secondary bag, Water Bottle, Balloon
Tooltip_AttachHikingBackpackTier1: Adds Slots: Secondary bag, Item 1, Water Bottle, Balloon
Tooltip_AttachHikingBackpackTier3: Adds Slots: Item 3, Water Bottle 2, Flashlight
Tooltip_AttachBigHikingBackpackTier1: Adds Slots: Secondary bag, Item 1, Water Bottle, Balloon
Tooltip_AttachBigHikingBackpackTier3: Adds Slots: Item 3, Item 4, Water Bottle 2, Flashlight
Tooltip_AttachAliceBackpackTier1: Adds Slots: Secondary bag, Item 1, Item 2, Water Bottle, Balloon
Tooltip_AttachAliceBackpackTier3: Adds Slots: Item 4, Item 5, Water Bottle 2, Flashlight
Tooltip_Carabiner: Can be used to attach items to backpacks
Tooltip_PostalDude: WOULD YOU LIKE TO SIGN MY PETITION?
Tooltip_Dimitrescu: Oh, Lady Dimitrescu! Beautiful even in death. That waistline... yes!
Tooltip_JasonV: Best to burn this before he returns....
Tooltip_MeatChunk5: I'm glad it wasn't ripped out of me....
Tooltip_Stantz: Ray Stantz used to wear this....
Tooltip_Spengler: Egon Spengler used to wear this....
Tooltip_Venkman: Peter Venkman used to wear this....
Tooltip_Winslow: I might want to find a tetanus shot....
Tooltip_Zeddemore: Winston Zeddemore used to wear this....
Tooltip_AddWalkieTV110: Attaches Army Walkie Talkie to TV-110
Tooltip_AddWalkieTV110Bag: Attaches Army Walkie Talkie to TV-110, Take out all magazines before this.
Tooltip_RemoveWalkieTV110: Removes Army Walkie Talkie from TV-110
Tooltip_RemoveWalkieTV110Bag: Removes Army Walkie Talkie from TV-110, Take out all magazines before this.
Tooltip_TV110Bag: Take out all items before this.
Tooltip_RotaryPhone: Say Hello to your Aunt Alicia, Bub!
Tooltip_HellraiserCube: The box… it is a gateway. A key.
Tooltip_HellraiserOpenThroat: No tears, please. It’s a waste of good suffering.
Tooltip_HellraiserPinhead: We have such sights to show you.
Tooltip_BalloonAnimal_1: You can’t help but smile a little.
Tooltip_Unicorn: They said the unicorn would bring smiles to the crowd. They didn’t mention the screams.
backpack: the Military backpack of Sector-7 Breach
Tooltip_item_ImmunoStasis3: The injection does not neutralize viral presence but instead slows progression by dampening immune overactivation and suppressing specific cytokine cascades that trigger cellular necrosis
Tooltip_item_NeuroCline7R: NeuroCline-7R is the regenerative successor to the NeuroCline-7 stimulant line, re-engineered to promote rapid physiological repair of damaged tissue following trauma
Tooltip_item_Endurase6B: Originally designed for surgical teams and containment field units, Endurase-6B allows subjects to maintain peak muscular output for extended durations
Tooltip_item_W460onlyMilitary: This item can only be installed on the Military variant!
Tooltip_NepRemoveIntactVehicle: Dismantling cars with a welding mask and propane torch will destroy them, and provide metalworking materials. <LINE> Higher Metalwork skills will retrieve more usable salvage.
Tooltip_NepRemoveIntactVehicleSS: Dismantling cars with a propane torch will destroy them, and provide metalworking materials. <LINE> If you squint you don't need a welding mask.
Tooltip_Vacp_ResetAddObject: If the item automation feature fails here, try using this button to repair it.
Tooltip_AsiaFoodMagazine: Teaches cooking recipes from the Asian Region.
Tooltip_EuropeFoodMagazine: Teaches cooking recipes from the European Region.
Tooltip_EmptyThermos: Can be used to store water, drinks or cooked soups
Tooltip_CookedBowls: Can be placed into bowls after Cooking.
Tooltip_Stock: Can be used in stock,soups or stews.
Tooltip_SausagesMagazine: Teaches how to butcher and how to make Sausages
Tooltip_Fortune2: 'Live this day as if it were your last.'
Tooltip_Fortune3: 'There are no regrets in life. Just lessons.'
Tooltip_Fortune8: 'What's the point of being if you're not being yourself?'
Tooltip_Fortune9: 'What good are wings, without the courage to fly.'
Tooltip_LunarNewYear: Usually eaten during Lunar New Year, if that's the case, Happy New Year
Tooltip_CheeseCurds: Can be aged into Parmesan Cheese Wheel in Pots, Cheese Molds or Buckets; or Strained into Mozzarela Cheese.
Tooltip_BlueCheese: Can be aged into Blue Cheese in Pots, Cheese Molds or Buckets.
Tooltip_PlaceholderFlour: sapph: since we can't yet use units in recipes, this will be used as placeholder in recipes
Tooltip_TakeoutBoxes: A disposable food package, can be used as a bowl.
Tooltip_zReCOMPonchos_MustNotBroken:
Poncho must be without holes!
Take it off before recolor!
Tooltip_VacMod2_Akaishi_Stew: To eat or not to be eaten.
Tooltip_VacMod2_Akaishi_Stew_Forged: To eat or not to be eaten.
Tooltip_VacMod2_Remains_Box: That little urn is your eternal resting place.
Tooltip_VacMod2_Rotten_Jerky: One jerky from a highly rotten piece of meat, maybe some kind of fish like to eat it.
Tooltip_VacMod2_Rotten_Meat: One highly rotten piece of meat, can't distinguish which game it comes from. But it looks suitable for composting in this game.
Tooltip_VacMod2_Rotten_Meat_Stack: Stack of highly rotten meats, but it won't feel disgusting.
Tooltip_GunP:
Press G to reload
Press G to fire
Tooltip_Muscle: Toggle - Muscles appear on this character
Tooltip_BodyHairGrowth: Toggle - Body hair and stubble grows on this character
Tooltip_item_AppearanceChanger: Holding this Spiffo gives you the ability to change your appearance. Check your Info panel
Tooltip_item_AppearanceUnlocker: Holding this bear gives you access to admin-locked customisation options.
Tooltip_VLEmptySyringe: Unused syringe. Used for medical purposes
Tooltip_VLZSpecimenContainer: Specimen container holding samples taken from a zombie
Tooltip_VLInfectedSpecimenContainer: Specimen container holding samples taken from a infected human
Tooltip_VLEmptySyringePack: Box of syringes. Contains 10 empty syringes
Tooltip_VLEmptySpecimenContainerPack: Box of specimen containers. Contains 10 empty containers
Tooltip_VLUpgradeStrengthSerum1: Strength +1. Inject directly into the upper arm to permanently enhance physical strength. Requires an Empty Syringe to use.
Tooltip_VLUpgradeFitnessSerum1: Fitness +1. Inject directly into the upper arm to permanently enhance fitness. Requires an Empty Syringe to use.
Tooltip_zReAmmoStrapBS: Reduces reload time for all weapons by 15%.
Tooltip_Apron_Juan_Valdez: Smells faintly of coffee beans and Colombian nostalgia. Perfect for serving lattes during the apocalypse.
Tooltip_Apron_Pronto: Makes you want to offer a hot dog and coffee combo for a bargain. Ideal for serving customers who are no longer breathing.
Tooltip_Apron_Starbucks: They spelled your name wrong on the apron, but at least you look like a professional barista.
Tooltip_Apron_Gengar: An apron that seems to watch you from the shadows. Does not guarantee the food won't come out haunted.
Tooltip_ApronWaist_Juan_Valdez: A waist apron for quick service. Coffee not included.
Tooltip_ApronWaist_Pronto: The elegance of highway fast food, now in a short format.
Tooltip_ApronWaist_Starbucks: For when you want to be a barista but also want to show off your new pants.
Tooltip_ApronWaist_Gengar: Keeps your clothes clean and your ghostly style intact.
Tooltip_Bikini_Akatsuki: The organization members never imagined their design would end up at the beach.
Tooltip_Bikini_Dulce_Princesa: Made of a fabric that looks like sugar, but is strangely durable.
Tooltip_Bikini_Gengar: Macabre smiles in strategic places. Very Goth-Summer.
Tooltip_Bikini_Marin: High-fashion Otaku design. Makes you feel like you're cosplaying at the end of the world.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_31_Min: Today's official poll top: Is it safe to go for a swim with zombies nearby?
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Alexa: Feel like the 'Five Feet of Fury' even while swimming.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Blackpink: How you like that? A top to survive with the style of an Idol.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Dewey: The future is now, old man. A simple design for complicated times.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Twice: For the ONCE who don't give up, even against the living dead.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Vaquer: Toughness and Chilean style for export. Straight to the ring... or the pool.
Tooltip_Bikini_Top_Zombhub: A strangely familiar logo. People will give you weird looks, but no one judges anymore.
Tooltip_Suit_Bruce_Lee: Be like water... or at least try not to get bitten while kicking ass.
Tooltip_Suit_Frozono: WHERE IS MY SUPER SUIT?! Well, here it is.
Tooltip_Suit_Goku: You feel your strength increasing, but unfortunately, you still can't fire a Kamehameha.
Tooltip_Suit_Homelander: You can do whatever you want. Except flying—that's still impossible.
Tooltip_Suit_Invencible: If you get bitten, you'll realize the name is quite ironic.
Tooltip_Suit_Kill_Bill: High-quality yellow leather. All you're missing is the katana and the list of names.
Tooltip_Suit_Los_Increibles: No capes. Edna Mode would be proud.
Tooltip_Suit_Mr_Increible: Flexible, durable, and packed with heroic style.
Tooltip_Suit_Miss_Increible: Feels a bit tight on the hips, but heroism has no size.
Tooltip_Suit_Saitama: An ordinary suit for a hero who wishes he could end fights with a single punch.
Tooltip_Suit_Superman: The symbol of hope in a world that ran out of it.
Tooltip_Suit_Viper: Chemical combat suit. Smells like toxins and victory.
Tooltip_Suit_Atom_Eve: A bright pink reinforced spandex suit. It's incredibly flexible and much tougher than it looks.
Tooltip_Suit_Gengar: Makes you feel like you could hide in the shadows.
Tooltip_Suit_Rick: Smells faintly of high-proof alcohol and arrogance.
Tooltip_Suit_Grizzbolt: A full Grizzbolt suit from Palworld. It's extremely hot but very soft.
Tooltip_Suit_Derpy: A giant cat costume. You'll die of heatstroke before they bite you; don't expect to run fast.
Tooltip_Suit_Casa_Papel: The famous red jumpsuit from the heist. Does not include the Dali mask or The Professor's plan.
Tooltip_Suit_FireForce: Professional gear. Nearly immune to fire with enviable ballistic and physical resistance.
Tooltip_Suit_SquidGame: Guard jumpsuit. Thick fabric designed to last through deadly games.
Tooltip_Suit_SquidGame_Verde: Player tracksuit. Very comfortable for running for your life.
Tooltip_Suit_Shaco: The joke tells itself. A full cloth suit that makes you a very colorful target.
Tooltip_DerpyHead: The iconic blue tiger mask from Demon Huntrx. Super K-Pop style!
Tooltip_GrizzboltHead: A giant Grizzbolt head. You look imposing, if a bit yellow.
Tooltip_GengarHead: Visibility is limited, but the fear it instills is very real.
Tooltip_RickHead: Look Morty, I'm a poorly made costume in Project Zomboid.
Tooltip_Mascara_Shaco: Why the long face? A plastic mask that's quite creepy.
Tooltip_Mascara_Casa_Papel: Bella Ciao. A plastic mask that hides your identity but limits your vision.
Tooltip_Mascara_Marshmello: Don't stop the party! Rigid plastic that offers slight facial protection.
Tooltip_Mascara_SquidGame: Reinforced metal. Offers real facial protection against bites.
Tooltip_Mascara_Vendetta: Ideas are bulletproof, but this plastic mask is not.
Tooltip_Dolphin_Shorts_31_Min: Short, comfy, and with the Titirilquen seal of quality.
Tooltip_Dolphin_Shorts_Dulce_Princesa: Bubblegum pink. Perfect for running through the Candy Kingdom... or Rosewood.
Tooltip_Dolphin_Shorts_Gengar: Features an evil smile in just the right spot. Ideal for survival cardio.
Tooltip_Dolphin_Shorts_WWE: Property of the Federation. Ready for a Royal Rumble against a horde.
Tooltip_PantsWithShoulderStraps_Gengar: A Gastly onesie. Very comfortable for looting haunted houses.
Tooltip_PantsWithShoulderStraps_MB: It's-a me! All you're missing is a pipe wrench and a princess in another castle.
Tooltip_PantsWithShoulderStraps_Mentita: Looks cute, but we all know Peppermint Butler has a dark side. Just like you.
Tooltip_Short_Chileno: The national team colors. Ideal for running like it's the World Cup qualifiers.
Tooltip_Short_Chileno_Girl: Feminine cut of the national team. Defend the base with Chilean grit.
Tooltip_Gorra_31_Min: The most prestigious cap in Chilean journalism. Top top top!
Tooltip_Gorra_31_Min_Atras: Informal look for a field reporter. Mico the Microphone approves of this style!
Tooltip_Gorra_BZRP: You feel like the beat is going to drop at any second. Includes mediocre rhymes as a gift.
Tooltip_Gorra_BZRP_Atras: For when the music session gets intense and you need to clear your forehead for looting.
Tooltip_Gorra_Duki: Original New Era cap. Gives +10 confidence but doesn't teach you how to trap.
Tooltip_Gorra_Duki_Atras: Modo Diablo activated from the neck up. Trap style never rests, not even in Kentucky.
Tooltip_Gorra_Momo: K-Pop style straight to your head. Perfect for a dance-off against zombies.
Tooltip_Gorra_Momo_Atras: Urban style inspired by Momo. Keep the rhythm and visibility while outrunning the horde.
Tooltip_Gorra_Twice: A cap for the ONCE who survived the outbreak.
Tooltip_Gorra_Twice_Atras: Rock the girls' logo while keeping an eye out so you don't get bitten from behind.
Tooltip_Gorra_Colo: The team of our hearts! Offers little protection but boosts your spirits.
Tooltip_Gorra_Colo_Atras: The team of our hearts! Reversed style for extra comfort.
Tooltip_Gorra_Chile: The national team colors. National pride on your head.
Tooltip_Gorra_Chile_Atras: The national team colors. National pride on your head.
Tooltip_Casco_FireForce: Specialized helmet. Shines with the light of a pure soul.
Tooltip_SombreroMago_FireForce: A very special witch hat. Explosive style.
Tooltip_Hoodie_ChainsawMan: Smells like gasoline and devils. Very cozy for cold nights.
Tooltip_Hoodie_DragonBallKaiser: The style of a freestyle champion. Drop rhymes while you flee.
Tooltip_Hoodie_Hisoka: Has the properties of both rubber and gum... well, it's just quality cotton.
Tooltip_Hoodie_Ponmi: Digitally immersive. Makes you feel trapped in a digital circus.
Tooltip_Jersey_Curry: For sinking supply runs from the three-point line.
Tooltip_Jersey_Michael_Jordan: The Last Dance. The ultimate jersey for those who don't accept defeat.
Tooltip_Jersey_Sakuragi: The basketball genius. Ideal for rebounds and school fights.
Tooltip_Jersey_Xokas: Comes with a free burner Twitter account. Ideal for winning imaginary arguments.
Tooltip_Hoodie_Kpop: Reinforced hoodie by Demon Huntrx. Thick, warm, and excellent scratch protection.
Tooltip_Jersey_Negra: FireForce athletic wear. Water-repellent and extremely lightweight.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Bravo: Captain Claudio Bravo. With this on, you'll block even the bites.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Bravo_2: Captain's uniform variant. Wearing this makes you feel like nothing can breach your defense.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Sanchez: The Wonder Kid. Spicy and fast enough to dribble through hordes.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Vidal: King Arthur. You play every day like it's a cup final.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Valdivia: The Magician. Capable of threading a pass through a thousand zombies.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Endler: Captain Tiane Endler. Total security between the posts.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Figueroa: Don Elias. The elegance of Chilean defense made into a shirt.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Dewey: The future is now, old man. A simple design for complicated times.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Dewey_2: Urban version of Dewey. Because being a misunderstood genius with style never goes out of fashion.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Momo_Twice: Momo Lovely. A touch of cuteness in a cruel world.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Momo_Twice_Bulls: Iconic 'Like OOH-AHH' outfit. Momo rocks a Bulls jersey while kicking zombie butt.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Twice: #OnceForeva. Because K-pop is life, even after death.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Excluded: A symbol of loyalty among friends. If you wear this, you're one of us.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Duki: Modo Diablo activated. Loot with the full power of trap music.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Bad_Bunny: The world's hottest tour arrived in Kentucky unexpectedly.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Arcangel: La Maravilla. Makes you feel like you're in a mansion, even if you're in a trailer.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Cerati: You deserve what you dream of. For now, you dream of not dying today.
Tooltip_Camiseta_BobMarley: Relax. Every little thing is gonna be alright.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Bodoque: I'm Juan Carlos Bodoque. This shirt is my 'green report' on the current disaster.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Pulentos: We are 'Los Pulentos', the new generation. Pure Chilean TV nostalgia.
Tooltip_Camiseta_BB: SCIENCE, BITCH! A reminder that cooking requires Level 0 Chemistry.
Tooltip_Camiseta_BS: I'm ready! I'm ready! (To get bitten).
Tooltip_Camiseta_Batman: Not the hero Kentucky deserves, but the one that's available.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Chicago_Bulls: A 90s classic. The logo everyone recognizes.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Hellfire: You belonged to the D&D club. Now the game is real and there are no saving throws.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Palworld: Collecting creatures was fun until they started hunting us.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Minecraft: Sssssss... BOOM! Luckily, this shirt doesn't explode.
Tooltip_Camiseta_LoR: One ring to rule them all... and one shirt to outrun the Orcs.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Gengar: Ghostly urban style. Gengar has your back.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Hisoka: Hunter x Hunter. A design as deceptive as the character.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Hunson: Hunson Abadeer shirt. The King of the Nightosphere himself. Commands respect.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Mentita: Peppermint Butler design. Looks sweet, but we know he practices the dark arts.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Alexa: Inspired by the WWE goddess. Small but lethal.
Tooltip_Camiseta_John_Cena: You can't see me! (If only the zombies couldn't either).
Tooltip_Camiseta_Vaquer: Stephanie Vaquer, 'The First'. Chilean toughness in the WWE.
Tooltip_Camiseta_ST: Stranger things are happening in West Point.
Tooltip_Camiseta_WR: Weird Stuff. Because there's no other name for what's happening in this town.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Zombhub: Warning: Wearing this may attract questionable stares.
Tooltip_Camiseta_AnimeH: A rather... 'cultured' print. You will be judged in silence.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Antagonista: Tago's shirt. For those who prefer the dark side.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Roja: Takashi Komuro's uniform. Ideal for leading a group of survivors.
Tooltip_Camiseta_DBZ: Goku print. You feel your Ki rising just a bit.
Tooltip_Camiseta_DBZ_2: Fan edition. Because you can never have enough Dragon Ball.
Tooltip_Camiseta_DBZ_3: Piccolo shirt. For those who prefer the hard training.
Tooltip_Camiseta_DBZ_4: Gohan shirt. Awaken your hidden power (or just run faster).
Tooltip_Camiseta_AT: Adventure Time: Princess Bubblegum and Marceline. An alliance against the end of the world.
Tooltip_Camiseta_AT_2: Adventure Time: Finn and Jake. A reminder of friendship in dark times.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Alexa_2: Official WWE merchandise. High-quality fabric, dense and durable.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Alexa_3: Alternative WWE merchandise. High-quality fabric, dense and durable.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Barbilla_Roja: Swift justice! It feels inspiringly protected against evil.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Chapulin: They didn't count on my cleverness! Offers absurdly high defense for a simple t-shirt.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Daddy_Yankee: El Cangri. Urban style that keeps up with the rhythm of the streets.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Daddy_Yankee_2: Neighborhood talent. Comfortable clothes to survive with flow.
Tooltip_Camiseta_HarleyQuin: Property of the Joker. Slightly tougher than common clothes.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Kairi: The Pirate Princess. Limited edition premium fabric.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Liv: Watch Me. High-end merchandise, protects well against the wind.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Liv_2: Watch Me V2. High-end merchandise, protects well against the wind.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Momo: Twice Collectible #2. Very soft with superior weight.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Nayeon: Twice Collectible #1. Very soft with superior weight.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Sana: Twice Collectible #3. Very soft with superior weight.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Oxxo: Reinforced polyester uniform. Designed to withstand long shifts and harsh conditions.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Rey_Misterio: 619! Ultra-light and breathable, ideal for agile combat.
Tooltip_Camiseta_SquidGame: Player t-shirt. Elastic synthetic fabric that wicks away sweat.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Tego_Calderon: El Abayalde. Classic and durable urban wear.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Kpop: Special fan edition. Better insulation than a normal t-shirt.
Tooltip_Camiseta_Hardy: A black shirt with the iconic Jeff and Matt Hardy logo. Live for the moment!
Tooltip_Pants_Momo_Twice: Tactical pants with the style of a K-Pop star.
Tooltip_Pants_Akatsuki: Red clouds that herald pain. Very comfortable for walking through the ruins.
Tooltip_Pants_Disney: Prince Ali, fabulous he! Pants for dreaming of flying carpets.
Tooltip_Pants_Ponmi: Puffy pants that make you feel like you're in a digital simulator.
Tooltip_Pantalon_Rosa: Vibrant pink pants. Because the apocalypse doesn't have to be grey.
Tooltip_Falda_Cuadrille: Hyosan High school skirt. Durable for the zombie daily grind.
Tooltip_Falda_Cuadrille_Larga: Long version of the Hyosan skirt. More modest but just as tough.
Tooltip_Falda_Azul_Corta: Momo Ayase style. Comfortable for hunting aliens or escaping hordes.
Tooltip_Falda_Militar: Reinforced tactical skirt. Btooom! style for real combat.
Tooltip_Falda_Verde_Corta: Fujimi Academy uniform. Short, light, and ready for action.
Tooltip_Pantalones_Cuadrille: Plaid school pants. The standard for Hyosan survivors.
Tooltip_Pantalones_Negros: Takashi's pants. Basic, black, and durable.
Tooltip_Uniforme_Verde: Saya Takagi's school uniform. Genius and style in one outfit.
Tooltip_Uniforme_Verde_Largo: Rei Miyamoto's school uniform. Classic version for spear combat.
Tooltip_Camisa_Escolar: Hyosan High shirt. Has some suspicious stains.
Tooltip_Camisa_Semitransparente: Saeko Busujima's silk shirt. Very soft, perhaps too soft for the mud.
Tooltip_Chaleco_Hombre_Verde: Hyosan wool vest. Keeps you warm during escapes.
Tooltip_Chaleco_Verde_Mujer: Female version of the Hyosan vest. Standard school size.
Tooltip_Chaleco_Rosa_Mujer: Momo Ayase style. Comfortable for hunting aliens or zombies.
Tooltip_Gakuran_MuyNegro: Closed Japanese uniform. Makes you look like a tough protagonist.
Tooltip_Gakuran_MuyNegroAbierto: Takashi's rebel style. More ventilated for combat.
Tooltip_Pijama_AT: Adventure Time, come on grab your friends... oh right, they're all zombies now.
Tooltip_Falda_Kpop: High-quality leather. Resistant to the teeth of fans... and zombies.
Tooltip_Falda_Azul_Larga: Traditional school uniform. Very light, offers almost no protection.
Tooltip_Pantalones_Hisoka: Baggy pants that allow for total mobility in combat.
Tooltip_Short_Kpop: Durable denim. Offers better protection than cotton shorts.
Tooltip_Calzones_Celestes: Saya's cotton panties. Comfortable for daily wear under the uniform.
Tooltip_Sosten_Morado: Saeko's lace bra. Hidden elegance beneath combat gear.
Tooltip_Sosten_Rosado: Rei's cotton bra. Practical and comfortable for survival.
Tooltip_Pantis_Moradas: Saeko's long stockings. Impeccable style even while slicing heads.
Tooltip_Pantis_Negras: Long black stockings. The standard accessory for the Fujimi uniform.
Tooltip_Pantis_MoradasMallas: Purple fishnet stockings. For a bolder, more gothic look.
Tooltip_Fishnet_Leotard_Momo: An elegant and daring fishnet design. Style is 10/10.
Tooltip_Pantis_Kpop: Thin stockings. Purely aesthetic, they tear if you even look at them.
Tooltip_Enterito_FireForce: 8th Company protection. Resistant to extreme heat.
Tooltip_Enterito_FireForce_2: Tamaki's suit. Watch out for that erotic 'beginner's luck'.
Tooltip_Chaqueta_FireForce: Heavy firefighter jacket. Protects you from flames and scratches.
Tooltip_Pantalones_FireForce: Elite firefighter pants. Very durable but somewhat heavy.
Tooltip_Chaqueta_Cyberpunk: Wake up, Samurai. We have a city to loot.
Tooltip_Respirador_Viper: Filters the air, but not the fear.
Tooltip_Corbata_Hombre_Escolar: Hyosan tie. A bit tight for running.
Tooltip_Corbata_Militar_Mujer: Btooom! tie. For a professional military look.
Tooltip_Humita_Mujer_Negra: Black school bow. The final touch for the Fujimi uniform.
Tooltip_Humita_Mujer_Verde: Green school bow. Identifies the Hyosan Institute.
Tooltip_Humita_Mujer_Roja: Momo Ayase's red bow. A splash of color for your outfit.
Tooltip_Zapatos_Blancos: White Uwabaki shoes. Silent, ideal for stealth.
Tooltip_Zapatos_Rosados: Pink Uwabaki shoes. Keeps your feet cool.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Harry_Potter: 10 points to Gryffindor for surviving another day.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Inosuke: Smells like the woods and wild boar. Makes you want to headbutt things.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Mikasa: It's warm. Reminds you that the world is cruel, but also very beautiful.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Nezuko: A traditional pink pattern. Keeps you warm and reminds you of family.
Tooltip_Bufanda_RavenClaw: For survivors who use their wits to avoid being dinner.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Tanjiro: Smells like charcoal and determination. Protects your neck from local 'demons'.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Tomioka: Half and half. A design for those who keep their cool.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Zenitsu: Bright as lightning. Ideal for when you want to run away in terror.
Tooltip_Bufanda_BobMarley: Relax, man. Everything's gonna be alright... or so the song says.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Hufflepuff: Warm and cozy knit fabric in Hufflepuff colors.
Tooltip_Bufanda_Slytherin: A firm scarf in Slytherin colors. Cunningly designed.
Tooltip_Revista_CDF_Vol1: Teaches how to craft Chilean national team jerseys and basketball legend gear.
Tooltip_Revista_Kpop_Vol1: Contains patterns for Twice, Blackpink, and urban genre outfits.
Tooltip_Revista_Artequin_Vol1: Learn to make themed bikinis, Dolphin shorts, and light summer wear.
Tooltip_Revista_Gorras_Vol1: Ancient secrets to wearing a cap like a pro.
Tooltip_Revista_Bufandas_Vol1: Learn to knit scarves inspired by demon hunters.
Tooltip_Revista_ZombHub_Vol3: Contains 'educational' orange and black designs. Ideal for one-handed reading.
